mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username, u.realname, r.department, r.doctor_name, r.visit_date, r.time_period, r.patient_name, r.phone, r.remark, r.status, r.create_time FROM sys_registration r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id ORDER BY FIELD(r.status, '待处理', '已确认', '已完成', '已取消'), r.visit_date DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username, u.realname, r.department, r.doctor_name, r.visit_date, r.time_period, r.patient_name, r.phone, r.remark, r.status, r.create_time FROM sys_registration r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.id DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.username, u.realname, r.department, r.doctor_name, r.visit_date, r.time_period, r.patient_name, r.phone, r.remark, r.status, r.create_time FROM sys_registration r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.status IN ('待处理', '已确认') ORDER BY FIELD(r.status, '已确认', '待处理'), r.visit_date ASC, r.time_period ASC, r.id ASC LIMIT 12
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_registration WHERE status = '待处理'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_registration (user_id, department, doctor_name, visit_date, time_period, patient_name, phone, remark, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{department}, #{doctorName}, #{visitDate}, #{timePeriod}, #{patientName}, #{phone}, #{remark}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_registration WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = '待处理'
